needle_load.note: Claude has a 3s 'idle' phase before needle_load; GPT-4o rolls that into needle_load. Combined idle+needle_load Claude=8s vs GPT-4o=9.2s — essentially agreement.

first_throw.note: Claude extends first_throw further; GPT-4o ends it earlier.

third_throw.note: Biggest single disagreement — GPT-4o sees a long pause/reorientation before the third throw as part of throw 3; Claude treats it as already in cut setup.

suture_cut.note: Mirror of the third_throw disagreement — Claude's cut phase is 11s longer because it absorbs the regrasping pause that GPT-4o assigns to throw 3. Sum of third_throw + suture_cut: Claude 45s, GPT-4o 45.1s — exact agreement on the combined late-task window.

gap_visible.note: Claude flags a possible small gap ('partial closure', very_low confidence) and adds 4pt penalty; GPT-4o sees no visible gap. This is the primary source of the penalty delta.

placement_alignment.note: Claude confidence 'very_low', GPT-4o confidence 'low' — both teachers explicitly call out monitor recording as the reason for low placement confidence.

fls_score_reconciliation.reconciliation_note: Teachers agree within 1.5 FLS points — strongest agreement of the V-series so far. Completion time is essentially identical (Claude 107 vs GPT-4o 109, delta 2s). The entire 4.5pt penalty gap comes from Claude's gap-visible / partial-closure assessment, which Claude itself flags as very_low confidence. GPT-4o's 488.5 is likely the more reliable point estimate; a midpoint of 487.75 is a reasonable reconciled value.

systematic_findings.boundary_disagreement: third_throw vs suture_cut — Claude assigns the late-task regrasping pause to cutting, GPT-4o assigns it to throw 3. Sum is identical (45s). This is a consistent pattern across recent comparisons: the two teachers disagree on where to draw the line between 'finishing the knot' and 'starting to cut'.
systematic_findings.drain_gap_divergence: Claude is more conservative about drain closure on monitor-filmed videos (V14 here, similar to prior partial-closure flags). Recommend cross-checking future partial-closure calls against GPT-4o before applying the full gap penalty.
